descriptions.text: Reloadian is an action roguelike built around fast-paced combat. Combine legendary weapons and restore order to a chaotic universe—solo or with friends.

Reloadian is a fast-paced action game focused on intense combat and creative build experimentation!
Defeat powerful bosses scattered across the universe and unlock legendary weapons and abilities hidden behind each victory. Every battle rewards you with new options, encouraging you to test different playstyles and discover powerful combinations.

Fight solo or team up in co-op gameplay, where coordination and timing are key to survival. Adapt to relentless enemies, master fluid movement, and push your combat skills to the limit.

With stylish action, replayable runs, and cross-platform play, Reloadian challenges you to forge your own path and define how you fight.

- 3-Player Co-Op Action : squad up with other Reloadians (or go solo).
- Brutal Boss Fights : face deadly encounters and learn their patterns.
- Every Run, New Build : choose your augments carefully — experiment, adapt, and push further.
- Shape Your Playstyle : try different weapons and find your best pick (sword, hammer, spear, guns ,...)
